assertionResults.reason: The DistributeShares screen suite includes explicit PRE / POST / DISTRIBUTED-state coverage, and the live paper-parity run confirms those stateful create-flow surfaces render correctly on the real `/create/*` routes.

Screen tests directly assert `markPackageDistributed(idx)` wiring on `/create/distribute` and the fallback `Mark distributed` affordance on `/create/complete`, covering both manual fallback surfaces required by the follow-up contract.

The DistributeShares screen suite covers the local-share badge, pre-state password/create controls, post-state masked password + package preview, and action-row enablement; the live parity run confirms the same structure on `/create/distribute`.

The DistributeShares suite includes exact-text assertions for the page header plus the three numbered 'How this step works' steps, and the live parity spec passed against the Paper baseline on `/create/distribute`.

The DistributionComplete suite covers the exact header/subhead/callout text, CTA enabled/disabled gating, and the pending-row fallback affordance, while the live parity suite passed on `/create/complete` against the LN7-0 Paper baseline.

summary: UI/parity proof set passed cleanly: 2 commands run, 5 assigned assertions passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
